bounded_result.candidate_theorem: Any repeated off-critical zero-kernel family that closes by a terminal sign or boundary identity must be removed before searching new zero witnesses.
bounded_result.frontier_rule: A closed witness family should become a local no-go theorem, not a repeated sampling target.
